goal: Research AI tool market pain points, identify what makes products feel AI-made/vibe-coded, audit Cryonex for polish gaps, and upgrade the app toward a world-class human-crafted feel across platforms

agents.role: Coordinate work, resolve questions, and merge outputs
Research AI study tools, AI tool complaints, Reddit/forum pain points, and anti-vibe-coded UI heuristics
Research what makes AI startups succeed vs fail with product, distribution, trust, and retention patterns
Audit the current Cryonex UI and identify flaws that make it feel unpolished or AI-generated
Run extreme test scenarios against the app and surface functional or UX breakage
